nodes.name: Check Job Type
nodes.notes: Routes service-unavailable-reply jobs to Twilio SMS without DB lookup

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value: We're sorry, this shop's SMS service is currently unavailable. Please call the shop directly or try again later.

nodes.name: Twilio: Send Service-Unavailable SMS
nodes.notes: M9 fix: blocked-tenant SMS reply via Twilio API (native Twilio node broken in n8n 2.10.3)

nodes.name: Validate Inputs (S3)
nodes.notes: S3: Validates tenantId (UUID) and customerPhone (E.164) before DB access

parameters.query:
SELECT t.*, sp.prompt_text as system_prompt
FROM tenants t
LEFT JOIN system_prompts sp ON sp.tenant_id = t.id AND sp.is_active = TRUE
WHERE t.id = $1::uuid
LIMIT 1

nodes.name: DB: Lookup Tenant + System Prompt
nodes.notes: S3: Parameterized query — tenantId via $1 placeholder

parameters.query:
SELECT set_config('app.current_tenant_id', $1::text, false);
SELECT * FROM get_or_create_conversation($2::uuid, $3);

nodes.name: DB: Get or Create Conversation
nodes.notes: S3: Parameterized — tenantId and customerPhone via $1/$2/$3 placeholders

nodes.name: Prepare Message Data (S3)
nodes.notes: S3: Sanitizes message body before parameterized DB insert

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO messages (tenant_id, conversation_id, direction, body, twilio_sid)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, 'inbound', $3, NULLIF($4, ''))
ON CONFLICT (twilio_sid) DO NOTHING

nodes.name: DB: Save Inbound Message
nodes.notes: S3: Fully parameterized — message body via $3 placeholder; no manual escaping

parameters.query:
SELECT body, direction, sent_at
FROM messages
WHERE conversation_id = $1::uuid
ORDER BY sent_at ASC
LIMIT 8

nodes.name: Call AI Worker (WF-002)
nodes.notes: Triggers WF-002 via webhook. responseFormat=text avoids Invalid JSON error when WF-002 returns empty body.
